# Whatsflow Finance — LLM Context Index
# Use this file as quick reference for AI-assisted development

## What is this?
Multi-tenant SaaS: CRM + WhatsApp + Finance + AI Intelligence for Brazilian SMBs.
Stack: React 18 + Supabase + Edge Functions + OpenAI.

## Key Files
- Routes: src/App.tsx (all routes defined here)
- Navigation: src/config/navigation.ts (sidebar menu)
- Permissions: src/config/permissions.ts (role matrix)
- Supabase Client: src/integrations/supabase/client.ts
- Tenant Hook: src/hooks/useTenantId.ts (ALWAYS use this for tenant)
- Auth Hook: src/hooks/useAuth.tsx
- Themes: src/styles/themes.css (3 themes via CSS vars)

## Architecture Rules
1. Never hardcode tenant IDs — use useTenantId()
2. Never hardcode URLs — use .env (VITE_ prefix for frontend)
3. Edge Functions use Deno.env for secrets
4. RLS on all tables — use get_my_tenant_ids() or is_nexus_user()
5. AI calls go through _shared/ai.ts → callAssistant() or callAI()
6. Email via _shared/smtp.ts → auto-detects SMTP2GO vs SendGrid
7. All routes under /app/:slug for client portal
8. Supabase anon key is public (safe for fallbacks)

## Portals
- /app/:slug — Client (DashboardLayout)
- /nexus — Admin (NexusLayout)
- /wl/:slug — WhiteLabel (WLLayout)
- /superadmin — SuperAdmin
- /god-admin — God Admin

## Database (75 tables)
Core: tenants, profiles, user_tenants, licenses, negocios, whatsapp_messages
Functions: get_my_role(), get_my_tenant_ids(), is_nexus_user()

## Edge Functions (35+)
Email: invite-user, send-recovery-email, resend-activation-email
Payment: asaas-webhook, create-checkout-payment, asaas-proxy
WhatsApp: uazapi-proxy, uazapi-webhook, meta-webhook, meta-send-message
AI: auditor-engine, instagram-ai-analysis, generate-rescue-plan
OAuth: meta-oauth-start, meta-oauth-callback

## Context Files
See .context/ directory for full documentation (18 documents).
